files.title: Type Safety in Engineering Software: The 10 Lakh Rupee Mistake
files.description: It started with a simple copy-paste. A junior engineer was rushing to finish a beam schedule. He copied a value from column A (**Depth in mm**) into a Python function that expected **Span in meters**.
